Guest Satisfaction Survey
OVERVIEW
LIST
How likely are you to book one of our vacation rental properties again?
2 Reponse(s)
How would you rate our customer service?
2 Reponse(s)
How would you rate the cleanliness of the home?
2 Reponse(s)
How would you rate the overall comfort of the cabin?
2 Reponse(s)
Do you have any suggestions to make this cabin a better and more enjoyable place to stay?
1 Reponse(s)
The pool cues could need to be replaced. A couple of them are a little warped. Maybe some rugs outside the showers. Other than that we found everything to be excellent.
What was the highlight of your Blue Ridge getaway?
1 Reponse(s)
Coffee in the morning in front of the outdoor fireplace. Being able to grill dinner on the deck and the peace and quiet. We had a very enjoyable time.
Signed in as: taylor.knight@cabin-rentals-of-georgia.comSMS Number: +17065255482
